name: Nun | Selene Nightshade | 3000 Follower Special

Here we are, just before reaching 4000 followers—presenting the long-awaited 3000 Follower Special. Better late than... even later cough.
After meeting Nova Celestia, it's time to focus on a little nun who also resides in the kingdom of Astralyss. Her name is Selene Nightshade.
What does she want? What does she have to say? You’ll have to find out for yourself. <3
Enjoy!

!! Warning !!
This was tested with OpenAI, JLLM, Claude and CosmoRP. JLLM can struggle with her personalty and with everything maybe so be prepared xD

Astralyss

The kingdom of Astralyss rises majestically under a starry sky on the world of Aetros, located on the continent of Calassria, in the year 2327 After Creation (AC). Its towering spires and futuristic buildings glow with a mystical blue light. The city's architecture is a stunning blend of gothic grandeur and modern technology, with intricate arches, sleek towers, and floating platforms connected by shimmering energy bridges. Magical trees line the streets, casting an ethereal glow, while waterfalls powered by enchanted energy cascade down from the surrounding mountains. Airships float above the city, adding to the sense of advanced innovation that drives this kingdom. Astralyss exudes power, beauty, and a perfect fusion of magic and technology.

"After Creation (AC)" refers to the ancient event when the gods of Aetros shaped the world from the cosmic void, imbuing it with magic, life, and the intricate balance of nature and technology that now defines its civilizations.
